productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Pink Tshirts
description: CompositionPink and grey pique, striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a grey ribbed collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with pink tipped ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, brand tab appliqued on the left chest and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryLook cool and sophisticated in this pink and grey pique polo T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The appliqued logo on the left chest adds an interesting detail to the tee, while the cotton keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
